summary: Phone Number Purchasing Feature - All tests PASSED. Backend API tests (12/12 passed) verified: Admin/Agent purchase endpoints, purchase status checks, org settings for allow_rep_purchases and monthly limits. Frontend UI tests verified: Agent sees Buy section on Phone Numbers page, Admin Settings has Phone Numbers tab with monthly limit, Org admin Organizations dialog has phone number settings toggle and limit input, Agent purchased numbers appear in Inbox Send from dropdown.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for successful creation (minor - works correctly)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Test phone numbers were cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone number purchasing feature is fully working. Admin can always purchase. Agent can purchase when org allows (allow_rep_purchases=true) and within monthly limit (rep_monthly_number_limit, 0=no limit). Agent purchased numbers are auto-assigned to them. Org settings restored to: allow_rep_purchases=true, rep_monthly_number_limit=0.

GET /api/phone-numbers/purchase-status -.description: Agent sees can_purchase=true when org allows rep purchases
Agent sees can_purchase=false with reason when org disables rep purchases

GET /api/settings/phone-numbers.description: Admin can get phone number settings for their org

POST /api/phone-numbers/purchase - Agent.description: Agent purchased number is auto-assigned to them
Agent gets 403 when org disables rep purchases
Agent gets 403 when monthly limit is reached

Frontend - Agent Phone Numbers page.description: Agent sees Buy New Phone Numbers section with state/area code search

Frontend - Admin Settings Phone Numbers.description: Admin sees Phone Numbers tab with monthly limit input and save button

Frontend - Org Admin Organizations dialo.description: Org admin sees Phone Number Settings with allow_rep_purchases toggle and monthly limit input

Frontend - Agent Inbox Send from dropdow.description: Agent sees their assigned phone numbers in Send from dropdown

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS sending: MOCKED - no real messages are sent
